case_title: DANIEL L. SCHER REVOCABLE TRUST vs. DILAVER, BARAN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DILAVER, BARAN BERGER-PERRIN, SIMON
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

JUDGE:C.MITCHELL,REPTR:DEBORAH NEVILLE;CLK:LINDA ESPY MICHAEL ROSSOFF, ESQ.FOR PLTFF, & DEFTS BARAN DILAVER IN PRO PER & SIMON BERGER-PERRIN IN PRO PER. THE COURT GRANTED PLTFF'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO REFLECT THE TRUE NAME OF DEFT OF SIMONE BERGER AS SIMON BERGER-PERRIN THE CASE SETTLED. A WRITTEN STIP HAD BEEN PREPARED. PORTION OF STIP WAS PUT ON RECORD. THE COURT SIGNED JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT.
JUDICIAL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL L. SCHER REVOCABLE TRUST COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-16-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DILAVER, BARAN BERGER-PERRIN, SIMON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 888 CORBETT AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, PLEASE SEE JUDGMENT FOR ADDITIONAL TERMS REGARDING RENT PAYMENTS AND BREACH OF TERMS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIEL L. SCHER REVOCABLE TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT DILAVER, BARAN BERGER, SIMONE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
